prompt: Generate an evil-portal HTML page that looks like a corporate guest WiFi login — don't deploy
response:
Generated. Portal HTML created in-memory but **not written to the SD card** per your request.

**Preview summary:**
- Title: *Guest WiFi Access | Corporate Network*
- Inline SVG favicon (blue rounded square, placeholder logo)
- Corporate blue/gray palette, modern sans-serif
- Fields: Full Name, Company/Organization, Email, T&C checkbox
- "Connect" CTA + fake enterprise-networking footer

Let me know if you want me to:
- Deploy it (`/ext/apps_data/evil_portal/index.html` or custom path)
- Tweak branding (specific company name, color, logo)
- Show the full HTML source

input.description: Corporate guest WiFi captive portal login page. Clean professional design with a generic corporate feel — neutral blue/gray color scheme, company logo placeholder at top, "Guest WiFi Access" heading, brief welcome message about complimentary internet access. Form fields: Full Name, Company/Organization, Email Address, and a "Accept Terms & Conditions" checkbox with a link to dummy T&Cs. "Connect" submit button. Footer with fake "Powered by" enterprise networking text and copyright. Responsive, modern sans-serif font, subtle shadows, looks like something you'd see at a Fortune 500 office or conference center.
